questions.question: Define the terms 'digraph' and 'binary relation' and provide an example of each. (5 marks)
questions.hint: A digraph is a directed graph and a binary relation is a relation between two sets.

questions.question: Prove that the following binary relation on a set of vertices is reflexive, symmetric and transitive: (u,v) is adjacent in the digraph if |u-v|=1. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Use the definitions of reflexive, symmetric and transitive binary relations.

questions.question: Let G be a digraph with 5 vertices and 7 arcs. Draw a digraph showing all possible Hamiltonian paths. (15 marks)
questions.hint: Note that a Hamiltonian path may not exist in the digraph.
